name: Vegetable Stew with Dolma
recipeIngredient: 1 carrot, cut into halves, then lengthwise
2 cups firm white fish, ground or finely minced
1/4 cup raw white rice, short grain
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onions in oil until soft.
2. Add all the vegetables and spices, except cilantro and zucchini, and stock. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer.
3. Make the dolma balls while it's simmering (see Dolma instructions).
4. When vegetables are half cooked, add the dolma gently, one at a time, on a spoon. Ensure they are well covered with liquid as they will double in size. Add a little water or stock if needed to cover.
5. Let simmer for 10 minutes, then add zucchini and cilantro and simmer until the balls are firm and rice is soft in the middle. Check while cooking and add more liquid if needed.
Dolma Instructions:
- Put all ingredients into a bowl and mix thoroughly. Roll into walnut-sized balls and set aside.
